theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon)
theme_and_archetype.description: Premium Executive Command Center. Dark theme with neon green (#00FF9C) accents. Deep blacks, crisp text, glowing active states. Highly authoritative, precise, and data-dense. Not cyberpunk gaming, but high-end financial/marketing analytics.

usage.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-heading font-bold tracking-tight text-white
usage.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-heading font-semibold tracking-tight text-white
usage.metrics: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tighter text-[#00FF9C]

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, Data-Heavy). Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap Strategy: gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/5 bg-[#050505] h-screen flex flex-col

surface_strategies.cards: bg-[#0A0D0B] border border-white/5 rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FF9C] text-black font-bold rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all hover:bg-[#00CC7D] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,156,0.4)] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00FF9C]/50
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#00FF9C]/30 text-[#00FF9C] font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all hover:bg-[#00FF9C]/10
buttons.ghost: text-[#8B9A92] hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

sidebar_nav.link_default: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-[#8B9A92] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-lg mx-2
sidebar_nav.link_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-[#00FF9C] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00FF9C]/10 to-transparent border-l-2 border-[#00FF9C] rounded-r-lg rounded-l-none ml-2 mr-2 shadow-[-4px_0_12px_rgba(0,255,156,0.1)]

charts.tooltip: bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-lg shadow-xl

what_if_slider.thumb: h-5 w-5 bg-white border-2 border-[#00FF9C] rounded-full shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,156,0.5)] cursor-pointer

components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#00FF9C]/10 text-[#00FF9C] border border-[#00FF9C]/20

copilot_background.description: Abstract neon green grid background. Use with low opacity (10-20%) as a texture behind the AI Copilot chat area or as an overlay in empty state cards.
copilot_background.usage_classes: absolute inset-0 opacity-10 object-cover mix-blend-screen pointer-events-none

ai_avatar.description: Glowing neon green spherical AI core. Use as the avatar icon for the AI Marketing Copilot in the chat interface.
ai_avatar.usage_classes: w-10 h-10 rounded-full border border-[#00FF9C]/30 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,156,0.2)]

user_avatar.description: Professional executive portrait for the CMO user profile/avatar in the sidebar bottom or header.
user_avatar.usage_classes: w-9 h-9 rounded-full object-cover border border-white/10

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, links, and key metric cards MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-dashboard-link', data-testid='metric-roas', data-testid='copilot-chat-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Ensure tailwind.config.js is updated with the custom colors (background, surface, primary).
Implement a responsive sidebar navigation that collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile.
Use Recharts for all data visualizations. Apply the specific dark theme styling (transparent bg, neon lines, hidden/faint grids).
Ensure all cards use the 'surface' background color (#0A0D0B) to contrast slightly with the main '#050505' background.
The What-If Simulator MUST have sliders that instantly update the adjoining charts or summary cards visually.
Include standard Shadcn components but heavily customize them. Strip away any default Vercel-like light styling and force them into the dark/neon theme.
Add the provided fonts (Outfit, Manrope, Space Mono) via standard CSS @import in index.css and extend Tailwind's theme.fontFamily.
Ensure 'Space Mono' is strictly used for large metric numbers to convey a dashboard/terminal feel.
